problem id: b9af70c0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01110101 -> 01000000
  01000011 -> 11000000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  00011100 -> 00000000
  11001111 -> 11000001
  11000101 -> 01000001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00001111 -> 11000000
  01011100 -> 00000000

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 00000001
